Verify Tailwind CSS v4 compatibility # Technical Notes - shadcn/ui components go in `src/components/ui/` - Use the 'New York' style (more refined) - Configure CSS variables to use our custom OKLCH tokens # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] shadcn/ui initialized successfully - [ ] Base components available - [ ] Dark theme renders correctly - [ ] No build errors # Reference See `agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/apps/web/components.json` for configuration pattern.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:12:37.472096397-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:22:52.975368174-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:22:52.975368174-05:00","close_reason":"shadcn/ui initialized with new-york style, dark theme default, 5 components installed (button, card, badge, tabs, tooltip), OKLCH tokens, build verified","labels":["design-system","shadcn","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-7yz","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:59.350789913-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-80h","title":"Feature: Testing Infrastructure Setup","description":"Set up core testing infrastructure for the project. ## Scope - Vitest for unit/integration testing (Bun-compatible) - Playwright for E2E browser testing - Test configuration files - Test scripts in package.json - Test utilities and helpers ## Philosophy (from user requirements) - NO mocks or fakes - test real behavior - Real implementations, real data fixtures - Detailed logging for debugging test failures ## Deliverables - vitest.config.ts configured for Bun - playwright.config.ts for E2E - package.json test scripts - Test helper utilities - Logging infrastructure for test output","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:09:37.96653903-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T22:49:38.815114737-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T22:49:38.815114737-05:00","close_reason":"All child tasks completed: Vitest installed, Playwright configured, test utilities created","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-80h","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-o7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:10:03.756411674-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-828n","title":"Build broken: PredictionLock.tsx missing dialog and label UI components","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-04T13:10:13.261426246-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T13:11:39.522391239-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T13:11:39.522391239-05:00","close_reason":"Fixed in commits 2b8f614, b2ba6ed - created dialog.tsx and label.tsx UI components"} -{"id":"brenner_bot-838e","title":"FEATURE: Hypothesis Template Library - Start from Examples","description":"Users shouldn't start from blank. Like Session Templates (reew.7) but for the hypothesis itself.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-04T03:36:02.902953104-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T19:53:12.673385293-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T19:53:12.673385293-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented hypothesis template library with 11 domain templates, UI selector component, and 40 tests","labels":["brenner-loop","hypothesis-engine"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-838e","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-an1n.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T03:36:14.662046207-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-84o","title":"Configure typography scale with fluid sizing","description":"# Task Set up a typography scale using clamp() for fluid responsive sizing. # Scale (Major Third - 1.25 ratio) ```css --text-xs: clamp(0.6875rem, 0.65rem + 0.15vw, 0.75rem); --text-sm: clamp(0.8125rem, 0.775rem + 0.2vw, 0.875rem); --text-base: clamp(1rem, 0.95rem + 0.25vw, 1.125rem); --text-lg: clamp(1.125rem, 1.05rem + 0.4vw, 1.375rem); --text-xl: clamp(1.375rem, 1.25rem + 0.65vw, 1.75rem); --text-2xl: clamp(1.625rem, 1.45rem + 0.9vw, 2.25rem); --text-3xl: clamp(2rem, 1.75rem + 1.25vw, 3rem); --text-4xl: clamp(2.5rem, 2.1rem + 2vw, 4rem); ``` # Line Heights (tighter for headlines) - Body text: 1.6-1.65 - Large text: 1.3-1.5 - Headlines: 1.1-1.2 # Letter Spacing - Small text: slightly loose (0.015em) - Headlines: slightly tight (-0.02em to -0.035em) # Fonts - Sans: Instrument Sans (or Inter as fallback) - Mono: JetBrains Mono (for code, terminal, operators) # Implementation 1. Add font imports to layout.tsx (next/font) 2. Define tokens in globals.css 3. Create utility classes or Tailwind config # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Fonts load correctly - [ ] Typography scales smoothly across viewport sizes - [ ] Headlines tight, body text comfortable - [ ] Code/mono text uses JetBrains Mono","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:08.992044195-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:35:45.282026352-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:35:45.282026352-05:00","close_reason":"Fluid typography scale added: 8 size tokens using clamp(), line heights, letter spacing, build verified","labels":["design-system","typography","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-84o","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-7yz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:46.297570969-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-84o","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:59.419182619-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-8b10","title":"Task: Implement Program Storage Layer","description":"# Task: Implement Program Storage Layer ## Objective Create file-based storage for research programs with session management. ## Implementation Details ### File Location `apps/web/src/lib/program-storage.ts` ### Storage Structure ``` .research/ └── programs/ ├── programs.json # Index of all programs └── RP-20251230-cell-fate/ # Per-program directory ├── program.json # Program metadata └── sessions.json # Session order and metadata ``` ### Index File Format ```json { "programs": [ { "id": "RP-20251230-cell-fate", "name": "Cell Fate Determination", "status": "active", "sessionCount": 4, "lastActivityAt": "2025-12-31T15:30:00Z" } ] } ``` ### Program File Format ```json { "id": "RP-20251230-cell-fate", "name": "Cell Fate Determination", "description": "Investigating mechanisms of cell fate decisions...", "researchQuestion": "What determines whether a progenitor cell becomes...", "sessions": ["RS-20251230", "RS-20251231", "RS-20260101", "RS-20260102"], "status": "active", "createdAt": "2025-12-30T09:00:00Z", "updatedAt": "2025-12-31T15:30:00Z", "tags": ["epigenetics", "cell-biology", "development"] } ``` ### Core Functions ```typescript // CRUD operations export async function createProgram( input: Omit ): Promise export async function loadProgram(programId: string): Promise export async function updateProgram( programId: string, updates: Partial ): Promise export async function deleteProgram(programId: string): Promise // Session management export async function addSessionToProgram( programId: string, sessionId: string ): Promise export async function removeSessionFromProgram( programId: string, sessionId: string ): Promise export async function reorderProgramSessions( programId: string, sessionIds: string[] ): Promise // Query operations export async function listPrograms( filter?: { status?: ProgramStatus; tag?: string } ): Promise export async function getActivePrograms(): Promise export async function getProgramForSession( sessionId: string ): Promise ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Programs stored in per-program directories - [ ] Index enables fast listing - [ ] Sessions can be added/removed from programs - [ ] Session order is preserved - [ ] Query by status and tags - [ ] Lookup program by session ID ## Dependencies - Task: Define Research Program Schema ## Effort Estimate ~180 lines of code, ~2 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:00.537943629-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:06:17.822786817-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:06:17.822786817-05:00","close_reason":"Storage layer exists at apps/web/src/lib/storage/program-storage.ts","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-2qyl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.164614498-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-4buj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.356683016-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:42:19.541683209-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","title":"Feature: Unit Test Coverage (Real Implementations Only)","description":"# Goal Add comprehensive unit tests for ALL untested modules using real implementations. # Philosophy: No Mocks Tests must use actual implementations: - Real parsers, not mock return values - Real DOM rendering via happy-dom - Real state management, not mock stores - Real event handlers, not spy callbacks **ONLY EXCEPTION**: framer-motion mock (already in test-setup.tsx) because animations cause test timing issues. # Modules Requiring Tests ## Priority 1 - Core Library (apps/web/src/lib/) - `corpus.ts` (8.2KB) - Corpus configuration and data - `prompt-builder.ts` (7.8KB) - Prompt composition logic - `prompts.ts` (2.2KB) - Prompt templates - `search/engine.ts` - Search engine core - `search/hooks.ts` - Search React hooks - `operators.ts` + `operators.local.ts` - Operator definitions ## Priority 2 - Viewer Components (apps/web/src/components/) - `DistillationViewer.tsx` (33KB) - **CRITICAL**: Main document display - `TranscriptViewer.tsx` - Transcript rendering - `QuoteBankViewer.tsx` - Quote bank display - `MetapromptViewer.tsx` - Metaprompt rendering ## Priority 3 - Interactive Components - `SpotlightSearch.tsx` (28KB) - **CRITICAL**: Main search UI - `OperatorSelector.tsx` (10KB) - Brenner operator selection - `SessionForm.tsx` (15KB) - Session creation form - `SessionActions.tsx` (8.7KB) - Session controls - `command-palette.tsx` (14KB) - Keyboard command interface ## Priority 4 - Navigation & Layout - `nav.tsx` (17KB) - Main navigation - `collapsible.tsx` (10KB) - Collapsible sections - `bottom-sheet.tsx` (5.8KB) - Mobile bottom sheet - `comparison-view.tsx` (6.4KB) - Side-by-side comparison - `reading-progress-widget.tsx` (6.0KB) - Reading progress indicator ## Priority 5 - Animation & Utilities - `animated-element.tsx` (6.1KB) - Animation wrapper - `animated-counter.tsx` (2.0KB) - Counter animation - `jargon-text.tsx` (7.8KB) - Jargon inline rendering # Test Patterns to Follow ```typescript // GOOD: Real rendering render(); await userEvent.type(screen.getByRole('searchbox'), 'brenner'); expect(screen.getByText(/§103/)).toBeInTheDocument(); // BAD: Mocked children vi.mock('./SearchResults', () => ({ default: () =>
mock
})); ``` # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Every module has a `.test.ts(x)` file - [ ] Tests use real data fixtures (not mock objects) - [ ] Coverage per module >= 80% lines - [ ] All tests run without network calls (use real local data) - [ ] Test file size roughly proportional to module complexity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:49:44.37797704-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T12:05:57.531171382-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T12:05:57.531171382-05:00","close_reason":"All 5 child tasks completed: Core Library Unit Tests (0meb), Viewer Component Tests (ponv), Interactive Component Tests (ph4p), Animation & Utility Tests (it7r), Navigation & Layout Tests (x712). 80%+ coverage achieved across all modules.","labels":["testing unit-tests no-mocks"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-vmsb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:36:00.86542915-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
